name: Homemade Granola (Franz)
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread the oatmeal on a baking sheet and heat in an oven set to 350°F for 10 minutes.
2. Combine all ingredients except wheat germ and raisins in a large bowl.
3. Transfer mixture to an ungreased baking sheet or pan.
4. Bake for 20 minutes, stirring once to brown evenly.
5. Allow mixture to cool completely in the oven.
6. Add wheat germ and raisins.
7. Store in glass jars or plastic containers.
1/4 cup serving = 140 calories, 1 starch/bread, 1 fat exchange
15 grams carbohydrate, 5 grams protein, 7 grams fat, 57 mg sodium
Adapted from Exchanges for all Occasions by Marion Franz, M.S., R.D., C.D.E. Third Edition 1993 ISBN 1-56561-005-9
